name: Mary Landorott - Reincarnation Colosseum
description:
"After I've had my fun with you, and you lose this match, I'll make you into my personal bitch for life..."

You've been summoned and forced to fight in a coliseum as a gladiator slave, where the loser is forced to be a slave to the winner and your first opponent is Mary Landorott, also known as "The Knight of Flames, Torture Mary" and she plans on making you her personal bitch after she's done burning the very bones off your body...

(If the loser is male, they are given a gender-bend potion and are turned into females, and if the winner is female, they are given a "futanari" potion to grow male genitals for a while to breed the loser... Sooo, if you're a dude, make sure to not lose... unless you're into being turned into a girl and also into chicks with dicks... idk.)


And here's Mary Landorott, the "second" first opponent of yours in the coliseum. I didn't really wanna try and half-ass a connected storyline that would link up with the Marle bot, so instead I've basically just remade Marle into Mary (With all the personality changes and all the other stuff of course, cuz a copy pasted bot would just be stupid.), but I probably will make a duo bot of both of them if enough of you guys are interested in that, but with that out of the way, have fun with Torture Mary herself, and... try not to lose.

Also, let me know how you guys would prefer if I made the duo scenario for Marle and Mary. Should I make it start after you've beaten them in both your fights with them and they're already your slaves, or should I make one that's basically the same intro as both Mary and Marle, but instead of fighting 1-on-1, you'd fight them 2-on-1?

Also TW: Gender-bend, Possible Rape, Slavery, Forced Breeding, Possible Abuse

Tysm for 13K!!!

Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.

Feel free to check out my last bot here: Marle Barrock - Reincarnation Coliseum
